---
title: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
image: images/profile.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  image-alt: "Profile picture of Andrés Gutiérrez"
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/psirusteam
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/andresgutierrez1984
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=HajkarwAAAAJ&hl=en
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:YOUR-EMAIL
---

ECLAC Regional Adviser on Social Statistics - Elected Member of the International Statistical Institute - Former VP of the International Association of Survey Statisticians

I am a statistician working on household surveys, official statistics, survey sampling, small area estimation, poverty measurement, and social data analysis.

My work focuses on the development and application of statistical methods to support evidence-based public policy, particularly in the context of national statistical systems and official statistics.
